name: SentinelOne
description: Automatic scan of uploaded files (hash reputation) and client IPs (threat-intelligence IOCs) with the SentinelOne API.

SENTINELONE_API_TOKEN.help: API token to authenticate with the SentinelOne console (sent as 'Authorization: ApiToken').
SENTINELONE_API_TOKEN.label: API token

SENTINELONE_API_URL.help: Base URL of your SentinelOne console API, e.g. https://your-console.sentinelone.net/web/api/v2.1.
SENTINELONE_API_URL.label: API URL

SENTINELONE_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout in milliseconds for SentinelOne API requests.
SENTINELONE_TIMEOUT.label: API timeout (ms)

SENTINELONE_SCAN_FILE.help: Activate hash-reputation scan of uploaded files (SHA1 lookup).
SENTINELONE_SCAN_FILE.label: Scan files

SENTINELONE_SCAN_IP.help: Activate threat-intelligence IOC lookup of the client IP.
SENTINELONE_SCAN_IP.label: Scan IP addresses

SENTINELONE_FILE_RANK.help: Deny an uploaded file when its SentinelOne reputation rank is greater than or equal to this value (1-10, higher = more malicious).
SENTINELONE_FILE_RANK.label: File rank threshold
